original_text: The acquired in-process research and development includes two assets, HLD-0915 and HLD-0117, that are being studied to treat prostate cancer and breast cancer, respectively.
modified_text: The acquired in-process research and development includes two assets, HLD-0915 and HLD-0117, which have been shown to treat prostate cancer and breast cancer, respectively.
claim: Acquired assets HLD-0915 and HLD-0117 have been demonstrated to treat prostate cancer and breast cancer, respectively.
citation_as_written: Pfizer Inc., Form 10-K for fiscal 2025 (pfe-20251231.htm), Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements — Acquisitions / IPR&D.
notes: Source says the assets 'are being studied to treat' the indicated cancers (investigational); the claim escalates to 'have been shown to treat,' asserting demonstrated efficacy. Verbatim passage from served filing (actually J&J jnj-20251228).
